title: Kth Smallest Element
hints: Use partial selection sort - only find the minimum for the first B positions.
For each position i from 0 to B-1, find the minimum element in the remaining unsorted portion.
Swap the minimum element to position i.
After B iterations, the Bth smallest element will be at position B-1.
This approach uses at most B swaps, which is more efficient than full sorting when B is small.
